items.docs: Create a new guild. Returns a guild object on success.
Returns the guild object for the given ID.
Modify a guild's settings. Returns the updated guild object.
Delete a guild permanently. User must be owner.
Returns the guild preview object for the given ID.
Returns all entitlements for a given app, active and expired.
Returns a list of guild channel objects.
Create a new channel object for the guild.
Get a channel by ID. Returns a channel object.
Update a channel's settings. Returns the updated channel object.
Delete a channel or close a private message.
Post a typing indicator for the specified channel.
Creates a new thread that is not connected to an existing message.
Creates a new thread from an existing message.
Returns messages for a channel. Requires READ_MESSAGE_HISTORY.
Post a message to a guild text or DM channel.
Returns a specific message in a channel.
Edit a previously sent message.
Delete a message. Requires MANAGE_MESSAGES for others' messages.
Delete multiple messages in a single request. Requires MANAGE_MESSAGES.
Create a reaction for the message.
Delete a reaction the current user has made.
Crosspost a message in an Announcement Channel to following channels.
Returns all pinned messages in the channel.
Pin a message in a channel. Max 50 pins per channel.
Unpin a message in a channel.
Returns a list of invite objects for the channel.
Create a new invite object for the channel.
Returns a list of invite objects for the guild.
Returns an invite object for the given code.
Delete an invite. Requires MANAGE_CHANNELS or MANAGE_GUILD.
Returns a list of channel webhook objects.
Creates a new webhook for the channel.
Returns a list of guild webhook objects.
Returns the webhook object for the given ID.
Modify a webhook. Returns the updated webhook object.
Delete a webhook permanently.
Execute a webhook by posting a message to its channel.
Returns a list of guild member objects.
Returns a guild member object for the specified user.
Adds a user to the guild using an OAuth2 access token.
Modify attributes of a guild member.
Remove a member from a guild. Requires KICK_MEMBERS.
Returns guild members whose username or nickname starts with the query.
Returns a list of ban objects for the guild.
Returns a ban object for the given user.
Create a guild ban and optionally delete previous messages.
Remove the ban for a user.
Returns number of members that would be removed in a prune operation.
Begin a prune operation. Requires KICK_MEMBERS.
Ban up to 200 users from a guild.
Returns a list of role objects for the guild.
Create a new role for the guild.
Modify a guild role. Returns the updated role.
Delete a guild role.
Returns a list of emoji objects for the given guild.
Create a new emoji for the guild.
Returns an emoji object for the given guild and emoji IDs.
Returns an array of sticker objects for the given guild.
Returns the list of sticker packs available to Nitro subscribers.
Returns an audit log object for the guild.
Returns a list of guild scheduled event objects.
Create a guild scheduled event.
Get a list of all rules currently configured for the guild.
Create a new rule for the guild.
Creates a new Stage instance.
Gets the stage instance associated with the Stage channel.
Returns the user object of the requestor's account.
Modify the requestor's user account settings.
Returns a user object for a given user ID.
Returns a list of partial guild objects the current user is a member of.
Create a new DM channel with a user.
Returns a list of connection objects for the current user.
Returns the application object associated with the requesting bot user.
Edit properties of the app associated with the requesting bot user.
Returns an array of available voice regions.
Returns an object with a single valid WSS URL for the Gateway.
Returns the Gateway URL and recommended shard settings.
